tagline: Where Every Meal Feels Like a Celebration
description: The Boozy Griffin is Bangalore's favourite gastropub, offering a carefully curated menu of global cuisine paired with handcrafted cocktails, live music, and an electric atmosphere. Whether you're here for a quiet dinner or a night out with friends, every visit is an experience.
address: 105, 1st A Cross Road, KHB Colony, 5th Block, Koramangala, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560095

services.title: Grilled Peri-Peri Chicken
services.description: Herb-marinated chicken chargrilled to perfection, served with garlic butter sauce and seasonal vegetables.

services.title: Truffle Mushroom Risotto
services.description: Creamy Arborio rice slow-cooked with wild mushrooms, truffle oil, and parmesan.

services.title: Classic Buffalo Wings
services.description: Crispy fried chicken wings tossed in house buffalo sauce, served with blue cheese dip and celery sticks.

services.title: Boozy Brownie Sundae
services.description: Warm chocolate brownie topped with whiskey caramel, vanilla ice cream, and crushed nuts.

reviews.name: Ananya Sharma
reviews.text: Best gastropub in Koramangala! The live music on Fridays is incredible, and the cocktails are top-notch.

reviews.name: Rahul Mehta
reviews.text: The Peri-Peri Chicken is a must-try. Great vibe, slightly slow service on busy nights but totally worth it.

reviews.name: Priya Iyer
reviews.text: We hosted our team dinner here and it was flawless. The staff went above and beyond.

faq.a: Yes! We recommend reserving in advance, especially on weekends. You can book directly through our website or Zomato.
Smart casual is preferred. No sportswear or beachwear, please.
Absolutely. Our menu clearly marks vegan, vegetarian, and gluten-free options. Just ask your server for recommendations.

faq.q: Is there live music every day?
faq.a: Live music runs Thursday through Saturday. Sunday to Wednesday we have curated playlists and occasional open-mic nights.
